title: Monday.com Support - Ticket history
excerpt:
I would like to have access to a list of all Monday.com support requests that I’ve submitted (to check status, follow-up, review the solutions, etc). 
As an Admin, I would like to see all tickets our users have submitted…

posts.author: Tam_Lloyd (Tammy Lloyd)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have access to a list of all Monday.com support requests that I’ve submitted (to check status, follow-up, review the solutions, etc).

As an Admin, I would like to see all tickets our users have submitted.
